rulings.Case Title: FLORA NG VS. STERLING REAL ESTATE PARNERS II, LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Sterling Real Estate Parners Ii, Llc, Sterling Pacific Lending, Inc., Dba Sterling And Yosemite Management Group, Llc'S Notice And Motion To Strike Portions Of Verified Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 21, 2012, line 1. Defendants Sterling Real Estate Parners Ii, Llc, Sterling Pacific Lending, Inc., Dba Sterling And Yosemite Management Group, Llc'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Verified Fourth Amended Complaint. Deny, allegations are relevant and proper to causes of action plead in fourth amended complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TBJ INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. SANJEEV KUMAR RAJ

rulings.Case Title: TBJ INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. SANJEEV KUMAR RAJ
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 21, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANTs SANJEEV RAI and IMPRINT COPY & PRINT's AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, personal service at address was not precluded per lease provision; Culver Center Partners distinguishable. = (501/REQ)
